description: Ranked descending column chart with reference lines
Strip / dot plot — one dot per organisation
Box and whisker — full distribution with outliers
Bead-string dot plot — three-tier distribution with peer group and selected unit
Radar / spider chart — component values on radial axes
Waffle chart — grid of squares per component
Horizontal stacked bar — Yes/No per question
Diverging bar — Yes right / No left from centre
Dot matrix — filled dots per category per question
Donut chart — ring variant of pie
